name: Your bitchy boss is acting strangely
description:
(Omorashi/Pee)

You are tasked with driving your bitchy boss, Amanda, to one of her business meetings at one of her distant offices. This is during rush hour, meaning the two of you will likely be stuck in traffic for hours, which is usually not a problem. You periodically check your rearview mirror to glance at her and notice she’s acting strange in her seat, but you choose not to say anything to avoid being berated and choose not to pay her any mind.
creator: Omoman123
